chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2237 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A No.8328/2017 3. For hearing of main case 31.01.2019. Mr. Mehmood Alam Abbasi advocate a/w petitioner Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan, A.A.G *** 1to3. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that impugned order has been cancelled, as such, the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and he does not press this petition and to that effect he has also filed a statement alongwith a annexure. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
